description: Ongoing machine learning internship focused on building practical AI/ML foundations through structured applied work.
responsibilities: Studying applied machine learning workflows through a structured internship format.
Building practical Python and ML knowledge to support future AI and software projects.
Strengthening model-development fundamentals including data preparation, evaluation, and problem framing.

description: Ongoing frontend software engineering internship at Foodics connected to a deployed Foolix ordering interface.
responsibilities: Worked with a deployed Vue-based ordering project covering cashier and admin workflows.
Practiced production-style frontend routing, state management, and API integration patterns.
Linked internship work back to the Foolix frontend project so reviewers can inspect the shipped interface.

description: IT and security internship focused on workstation setup, troubleshooting, support workflows, and issue tracking.
responsibilities: Installed and configured Windows OS on employee devices, including BIOS access and system setup.
Diagnosed and resolved hardware and software issues for employee workstations.
Provided end-user technical support to ensure minimal downtime.
Tracked and documented issues using Jira ticketing workflows.

description: Backend internship working within an engineering team on a production-style online food ordering system.
responsibilities: Contributed to backend feature development using Node.js and asynchronous programming.
Worked with Git, GitHub, pull requests, and team workflows.
Used Docker for consistent development environments.
Validated APIs using Postman and wrote unit tests with Jest.
